case_title: Oportun Incorporated VS. VICTOR CHRISTIAN KERLEGAND MARTINEZ

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INCORPORATED RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MARTINEZ, VICTOR CHRISTIAN KERLEGAND $1,438.64 PRINCIPAL, $85.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,523.64 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
